group.description: Eclipse RCP-specific concepts: classifies bundles as framework or application bundles, extracts platform filter (OS/architecture) and localization properties.

concept.description: Extracts the Eclipse-PlatformFilter manifest header and sets platformFilter, targetOs, and targetArch properties on the bundle. Labels such bundles as :Eclipse:PlatformSpecific.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Eclipse-PlatformFilter"}) WITH bundle, trim(entry.value) AS filter SET bundle:Eclipse:PlatformSpecific, bundle.platformFilter = filter WITH bundle, filter // Extract osgi.os value WITH bundle, filter, CASE WHEN filter CONTAINS "osgi.os=" THEN split(split(filter, "osgi.os=")[1], ")")[0] ELSE null END AS os, CASE WHEN filter CONTAINS "osgi.arch=" THEN split(split(filter, "osgi.arch=")[1], ")")[0] ELSE null END AS arch SET bundle.targetOs = os, bundle.targetArch = arch RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, filter AS PlatformFilter, os AS OS, arch AS Arch

concept.description: Extracts the Bundle-Localization manifest header (typically "plugin") used for Eclipse i18n.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-Localization"}) SET bundle.bundleLocalization = trim(entry.value) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, bundle.bundleLocalization AS Localization

concept.description: Labels bundles with symbolic names starting with "org.eclipse." as :Eclipse:FrameworkBundle to distinguish Eclipse platform bundles from application bundles.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle) WHERE bundle.bundleSymbolicName STARTS WITH "org.eclipse." SET bundle:Eclipse:FrameworkBundle RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS EclipseBundle

concept.description: Labels OSGi bundles that are NOT Eclipse framework bundles as :Eclipse:ApplicationBundle, helping to distinguish custom application code from platform dependencies.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle) WHERE NOT bundle:Eclipse:FrameworkBundle SET bundle:Eclipse:ApplicationBundle RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS ApplicationBundle
